mapper.select: SELECT business_id AS businessId, login_id AS loginId, company_name AS companyName, password_hash AS passwordHash, phone_number AS phoneNumber, role, status, created_at AS createdAt, updated_at AS updatedAt FROM business WHERE login_id = #{loginId}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM business WHERE login_id = #{loginId}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM business WHERE phone_number = #{phoneNumber}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM business WHERE company_name = #{companyName}
mapper.update: UPDATE business SET company_name = #{companyName}, phone_number = #{phoneNumber}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE login_id = #{loginId}
